title: Create Crafts Renewed
description: Adds a lot of new recipes for items
body:
# This mod adds new recipes for a few items
This mod adds a simpler recipe for obsidian, redstone, and more...  
### This mod will probably make the game a bit easier; If you don't want that, don't use this mod
## Dependencies
- This mod requires [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) to work
- Using [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) is highly recommended for recipes, however, you can see some of the recipes in the [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-crafts-renewed/gallery), but not all of them
- You can find an addon for this mod mixed coppers [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-mixed-copper-tools)
##
You're free to use this mod in a mod pack
> if you have any suggestions, don't hesitate to tell me (`parham125` on Discord)
